caribbean.headline: Storm Hits Grand Cayman
caribbean.paragraph: Grand Cayman is experiencing 100% rain probability with southeast swells and wave heights reaching 6.1 ft, while winds are relatively calm at 16 kt. Roatan, on the other hand, is seeing stronger winds at 30 kt, making it a close second in terms of weather impact in the Western Caribbean today.

mediterranean.headline: Mediterranean Winds Remain Mild
mediterranean.paragraph: Venice is experiencing 12 kt winds with a 50% rain probability, while waves are reaching 2.4 ft in height. Lisbon is seeing similar conditions, with 13 kt winds and less than 10% rain probability, as the region remains under mild and stable weather patterns.
